markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, audience, and quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content must be practitioner-focused, not 101-level.** The target audience is sophisticated engineers and founders, not hobbyists or students. Content must provide actionable tradeoffs and insights, not just specs.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [**A new "Learning Center" is needed to house SEO-driven content.** This separates it from the main blog, protecting the brand's credibility with its expert audience.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**The proposed LLM inference glossary must be expanded to cover all inference types.** It must also meet the high-quality, technical bar set by competitor Modal's GPU glossary.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**GrowthX will deliver new samples (glossary terms, outlines) for review.** These will test if their AI pipeline can meet Baseten's technical depth requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Audience Alignment

  - [Baseten's core concern is protecting its brand credibility with a highly technical audience.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Sophisticated engineers and founders who are early in their product journey but have deep technical knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [**Not:** Hobbyists, undergrads, or those needing 101-level explanations.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [**Content Standard:** Must provide actionable insights and tradeoffs (e.g., quality vs. cost vs. speed) from a practitioner's POV.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This contrasts with surface-level content (e.g., NVIDIA marketing specs) that is perceived as "for bots" and would damage Baseten's credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)

### Proposed Solution: A "Learning Center"

  - [To resolve the conflict between SEO and brand credibility, Baseten proposed a separate "Learning Center" section on the website.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Purpose:** House foundational, 101-level content (e.g., glossary terms, beginner guides) that is valuable for SEO but not suitable for the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Benefit:** This structure allows Baseten to capture top-of-funnel traffic without diluting its expert brand.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

### Glossary Proposal & Quality Benchmark

  - [GrowthX proposed a glossary of 200+ LLM inference terms to build authority and drive SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Baseten's Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [**Scope:** Must expand beyond LLM inference to cover all inference types Baseten supports.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Quality:** Must meet the high technical standard set by competitor Modal's GPU glossary.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Location:** Should be a standalone section (`/glossary`), not part of the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### GrowthX's AI Pipeline & New Samples

  - [GrowthX introduced Stevie Kim (PM, ex-MLOps) to refine content and agentic pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [GrowthX's CTO, Daniel, has been fine-tuning their AI pipeline to meet Baseten's technical requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Proof Point:** Daniel's internal articles, built with the refined pipeline, show a 1-week reference time, suggesting the pipeline can deliver the required depth.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
      - [Deliver new content samples for review:](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
          - [Refined glossary terms (expanded scope, higher technical depth).](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
          - [Outlines for the next three articles.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [Propose a structure for the new "Learning Center."](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
      - [Share their new tech blog for Baseten's feedback on tone and audience.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [**Baseten:**](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
      - [Review all new samples and proposals.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [Share the H100 vs. B200 article referenced in the meeting as a negative example.](https://fathom.video/share/YMmzG2LhNn1d_jVSxdbyp2Aass-X8p9u?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
